entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., the target crop for hybrid breeding

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen is non-functional, exploited for hybrid breeding

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING SYSTEM
entities.description: A commercial system for producing hybrid seeds in pigeonpea

entities.name: A4 CMS SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic male sterility system derived from C. cajanifolius

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: The wild relative of pigeonpea from which the A4 CMS system was derived

entities.name: EXPRESSION PROFILING
entities.description: Analysis of mitochondrial gene expression levels to identify differentially expressed genes

entities.name: STRUCTURAL VARIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to identify length variations in mitochondrial genes

entities.name: NAD4L
entities.description: A mitochondrial gene showing significantly higher expression in CMS lines

entities.name: NAD7A
entities.description: A subunit of the nad7 gene associated with the A4 CMS system

entities.name: SANGER SEQUENCING
entities.description: A DNA sequencing method used to identify SNPs and deletions in genes

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Single base pair variations identified in the upstream region of nad4L

entities.name: PROTEIN STRUCTURE EVALUATION
entities.description: Analysis of predicted protein structures to identify conformational changes

entities.name: POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A technique used to develop and validate the nad7a_del Indel marker

entities.name: NAD7A_DEL
entities.description: A PCR-based Indel marker used for testing genetic purity of A4 CMS lines

entities.name: GENETIC PURITY
entities.description: The quality of A4 derived CMS lines used to strengthen hybrid breeding

relationships.description: revealed significant differential expression of nad4L
identified SNPs in the upstream region of nad4L
identified a 10 bp deletion in nad7a
showed conformational changes in predicted protein structure of nad7a
associated with CMS for A4 cytoplasm
used to develop the nad7a_del marker
strengthens the commercial hybrid breeding program
